heroBanner.title: Precision in Engineering, Integrity in Care.
heroBanner.description-1: Driving medical innovation through advanced technology, Jundaoxin delivers safer and more precise clinical solutions for global healthcare.
heroBanner.description-2: Pursuing excellence in every detail and pouring care into every action. Jundaoxin upholds the spirit of craftsmanship, safeguarding the high-quality development of the healthcare industry through innovation.

about.title: About US

heroBanner.title: The business covers 34 or more regions
heroBanner.subtitle: The business network covers major cities across the country and connects Shandong with other regions

about.description-1: Founded in 2015, Jundaoxin is driven by a global perspective and a deep understanding of local medical needs. We are dedicated to pioneering technological iterations and industrial upgrades. By fostering a robust "Industry-Academia-Research-Hospital" synergy, we collaborate with top-tier universities and Class-A hospitals to transform cutting-edge research into a powerful force that safeguards life.
about.description-2: Over the years, we have lived our commitment: "Empowering Healthcare with Technology, Safeguarding Health with Quality." We equip clinicians with superior tools and provide patients with compassionate care. Looking ahead, Jundaoxin will continue to deliver high-value medical solutions, driving the steady progress of China’s healthcare industry.

contact.title: Contact US
contact.address: No. 502, 1-2 Floor, Science and Technology Center, Zhangjin Comprehensive Bonded Zone, South Road 99, Hongxing 2nd Road, Jinan Area, Shandong Province, China
contact.qr_message: Welcome to scan the QR code to follow our official WeChat account. We will continuously send you the latest product updates, function enhancements, event information and professional service contents, allowing you to obtain the first-hand information at any time and anywhere

form.title: Leave us a message
form.description-1: We have always been committed to providing high-quality products and services for doctors and patients. We sincerely hope to hear your opinions and suggestions, and we will reply to your inquiries as soon as possible. However, due to the large volume of online consultations, we may not be able to reply to you on the same day.
form.description-2: If you wish to receive the feedback on the same day, you can contact us by calling the following number: 0531-81170998. Thank you for your understanding and support!
form.success: Your message has been sent successfully!
form.error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again later.
